title: Quiz: Which SMC Pattern Gives 90% Win Rate?
description: Think you know Smart Money Concepts? Test your knowledge on the most profitable market structure pattern that pros use daily. Can you spot the winner?
script: Which Smart Money pattern has the highest win rate? A) Break of Structure B) Order Block C) Fair Value Gap The answer is B! Order blocks rule the game. Order blocks show where smart money accumulated. Trade these levels religiously.
